app.title: Social Home
login.title: Social Home
login.disabled: Token login is disabled — log in via Home Assistant.
login.rate_limit: Too many attempts — wait a few minutes.
login.ha_note: On Home Assistant, this form is bypassed — Ingress signs you in automatically.
setup.standalone.title: Set up Social Home
setup.standalone.intro: Choose an admin username and password for your Social Home instance. You’ll use these to sign in.
setup.ha.title: Pick your Home Assistant user
setup.ha.intro: Choose which Home Assistant person becomes the Social Home admin, and set a password for signing in from the web UI or the API.
setup.ha.no_persons: No Home Assistant persons found. Add a person.* entity in HA first, then reload this page.
setup.haos.welcome_intro: Your Home Assistant owner will be your Social Home admin. Other household members can be added later from the admin panel.
setup.haos.bullet_owner: We’ll use your Home Assistant owner as the first admin.
setup.haos.bullet_ingress: Sign-in is automatic — Home Assistant Ingress signs you in for you.
setup.haos.bullet_invite: Invite the rest of your household from the admin panel.
setup.haos.completing: Detecting your Home Assistant owner via the Supervisor…
setup.error.password_too_short: Password must be at least 8 characters.
feed.title: Household Feed
feed.no_posts: No posts yet. Share something with your household!

spaces.no_spaces_hint: Create a space to start sharing with friends and family.
spaces.no_posts: No posts in this space yet.

tasks.no_tasks: No tasks yet. Click "+ Add task" to create one.

presence.title: Household Presence
bazaar.title: Bazaar
notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.enable: Enable push notifications to stay updated.
notifications.push_enabled: You will receive push notifications for new messages and mentions.
notifications.push_disabled: Enable push notifications to stay updated when you are away.

settings.privacy.online_status: Show online status to other household members
settings.notifications.title: Notifications
settings.appearance.title: Appearance

pages.title: Pages
pages.conflict_message: Another user ({user}) edited this page while you were editing. Choose which version to keep.
admin.title: Admin Panel
admin.not_admin: You must be an admin to view this page.
admin.members.title: Household Members
admin.members.name: Name
admin.moderation.title: Moderation Queue
admin.moderation.empty: No pending reports. Items appear here when a member flags a post, comment, or sticky for admin review.
admin.sessions.title: Sessions
admin.sessions.description: Each token represents one signed-in browser or app. Revoke any token you don't recognise.
admin.sessions.label: Label
admin.settings.title: Household Settings
connections.title: Connections
connections.no_connections_hint: Pair with another Social Home instance to share spaces, send messages, and see each other’s presence.
gfs.title: Global Federation Servers
gfs.pairing_failed: Failed to connect to GFS server. Check the URL and try again.
gfs.no_servers_hint: Connect to a GFS to publish spaces for global discovery.
gfs.confirm_disconnect: Disconnect from this GFS? Published spaces will be unpublished.
space.no_gfs_connections: No GFS servers connected. Add one in Connections.
pairing.title: Pair with Household
pairing.intro: Scan the QR code on the other household’s device, or let them scan yours.
pairing.show_qr: Show this to the other household:
pairing.waiting: Waiting for the other side to scan...
pairing.success_message: You can now share spaces and send messages with this household.
pairing.failed_message: The connection could not be established. Please try again.
pairing.role_show_hint: They scan this device with their camera.
pairing.role_show_aria: Start pairing by showing a QR code on this device.
pairing.role_scan_hint: Point this device’s camera at theirs.
pairing.role_scan_aria: Start pairing by scanning a QR code with this device.
pairing.scan_intro: Line up the other household’s QR code inside the frame.
pairing.scan_permission_denied: Camera access was denied. Upload a screenshot or paste the pairing link instead.
pairing.scan_no_camera: No camera found on this device. Upload a screenshot or paste the pairing link instead.
pairing.scan_no_detector: Live QR scanning isn’t supported in this browser. Upload a screenshot or paste the pairing link instead.
pairing.scan_failed: Couldn’t start the camera. Try uploading a screenshot or pasting the pairing link.
pairing.scan_no_camera_hint: Camera preview disabled. Use upload or paste below.
pairing.scan_no_code_in_image: No QR code found in that image.
pairing.scan_decode_failed: Couldn’t read that image. Try a different screenshot.
pairing.scan_wrong_kind: That doesn’t look like a Social Home pairing code.
pairing.scan_paste_label: Paste the pairing link or JSON here:
pairing.sas_instructions: Tell the person on the other device these six digits so they can confirm the connection.
pairing.sas_waiting: Waiting for the other admin to confirm…
calls.title: Calls
gallery.title: Gallery
gallery.no_albums: No albums yet — create one to start sharing photos.
gallery.no_images: No images yet. Upload photos in posts to see them here.
search.title: Search
event.host_queue.title: Pending requests · {n}
event.reminder.heading: Reminders
event.reminder.help: We'll ping you so you don't miss this event.
event.reminder.invalid: Reminder offset must be a non-negative number of minutes.
event.subscribe.heading: Subscribe in your calendar app
event.subscribe.help: Mint a private feed URL — paste it into Apple Calendar, Google Calendar, Outlook, or Thunderbird to see this space's events alongside your own.
event.subscribe.empty: No feed URL yet. Create one to subscribe.
event.subscribe.copy_failed: Couldn't copy. Select and copy manually.
event.subscribe.regenerated: Generated a fresh URL — the old one no longer works.
event.subscribe.confirm_regenerate: Regenerating will invalidate the existing URL. Anyone subscribed will need the new one. Continue?
event.subscribe.confirm_revoke: Revoking the feed URL stops your calendar app from refreshing. You can mint a new one later. Continue?
event.subscribe.steps.apple.2: Paste the URL and click Subscribe.
event.subscribe.steps.apple.3: Choose a refresh interval (e.g. every hour).
event.subscribe.steps.google.2: Paste the URL and click Add calendar.
event.subscribe.steps.outlook.2: Paste the URL, name it, and import.
event.subscribe.steps.thunderbird.1: File → New → Calendar… → On the Network.
event.subscribe.steps.thunderbird.2: Choose iCalendar (ICS), paste the URL, and finish.
event.dialog.title: New Event
event.dialog.capacity_help: Members' "going" RSVPs become pending requests. Overflow goes to a waitlist that auto-promotes when seats free up.
event.dialog.capacity_invalid: Capacity must be a non-negative number.
